DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S AND GINA WALKER'S MOTION TO CONTINUE PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE AND FOR EXTENSION OF ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE NOR AN OBJECTION TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION IS ADOPTED. MOTION IS ORDERED GRANTED. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WITHIN FIVE DAYS. COURT ORDERED THE ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION EXTENDED TO 8/10/2007. THE ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS RE-SET TO 9/6/2007 AT 1:30 PM, IN DEPARTMENT 212. CONT. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-30-2007 Continued To Sep-06-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Continue Pre Arbitration Settlement Conference And For Extension Of Arbitrator'S Jurisdiction
Off Calendar Apr-26-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Defendants City and County of San Francisco's and Gina Walker's Motion to Continue Pre-Arbitration Settlement Conference and for Extension of Arbitrator's Jurisdiction is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Court ordered the Arbitrator's Jurisdiction extended to 8/10/2007. The Arbitration Order to Show Cause is re-set to 9/6/2007 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Court to give notice of the Pre-Arbitration Settlement Conference. Proceedings reported by: Maria Viscio, CSR#12353. (212)
